message:
♿ Fix 5 WCAG accessibility violations caught by Playwright (#10753)

- DemoToLocalCTA: change h3 to p (heading hierarchy skip violation)
- DiscoverCardsPlaceholder: add aria-label to carousel chevron buttons
- Navbar: replace aria-label with title on text button (label-content-name-mismatch)
- Sidebar.spec: increase timeouts for collapse toggle visibility in CI

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -103,9 +103,9 @@ export function DemoToLocalCTA() {
-

+

Set up GitHub OAuth to sign in -

+

You're viewing demo data — configure GitHub OAuth to authenticate and connect your clusters

@@ -143,9 +143,9 @@ export function DemoToLocalCTA() {
-

+

Install KubeStellar Console locally to connect your clusters -

+

You're viewing demo data — install locally to monitor your real clusters

@@ -73,6 +73,7 @@ export function DiscoverCardsPlaceholder({
             <button
               onClick={() => setCurrentIndex(prev => (prev - 1 + available.length) % available.length)}
               className="p-1 rounded hover:bg-secondary text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100"
+              aria-label="Previous card"
             >
               <ChevronLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
             </button>
@@ -89,6 +90,7 @@ export function DiscoverCardsPlaceholder({
             <button
               onClick={() => setCurrentIndex(prev => (prev + 1) % available.length)}
               className="p-1 rounded hover:bg-secondary text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100"
+              aria-label="Next card"
             >
               <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
             </button>
